no: Per morpheus562: 'New encounters should be installed prior to SCS while updates to existing encounters should be installed after SCS.' TR detects SCS and adapts. v7.3 (April 2026): Beholder attack fix, Resar mage scripts, thief/MF script fixes, IWD mage Comet HLA level prereq, Kryll casting update.

conflicts.reason: TR v3.0+ is a comprehensive difficulty overhaul that substantially duplicates SCS's AI and encounter systems. User reports recommend treating TR and SCS as effective either-or for the AI/encounter layer; a select few SCS general-game tweaks (non-AI, non-encounter) remain compatible. TR's author designed TR to detect SCS and adapt, so technical co-installation works, but the functional overlap is significant enough that picking one is usually cleaner. Previous framing (partial/orderOnly): Broad interaction — TR detects SCS via MOD_IS_INSTALLED for 4 components: IWD Arcane Spells (cn:1500), IWD Divine Spells (cn:1510), Initialize AI (cn:5900), and Smarter Mages (cn:6030). TR adapts spell handling when SCS IWD spells are present, conditionally skips its Kangaxx demilich script when SCS cn:6030 is installed, and removes SCS troll kill flags from boss weapons (dragons, Irenicus). SCS AI/encounter overhauls overlap with TR encounter overhauls — per Morpheus (TR author): 'Any encounter or AI updates from SCS will not be compatible with Tactics Remix. SCS QoL updates prior to AI/tactical components should mostly be okay.' Install SCS before TR; TR must install after SCS.
conflicts.myComps: #0 Improved de'Arnise Keep / #15 Tougher Kangaxx / #65 #66 Improved Irenicus / all encounter components
conflicts.theirComps: #1500 IWD Arcane / #1510 IWD Divine / #5900 Initialize AI / #6030 Smarter Mages / #8060 Improved de'Arnise Keep
conflicts.source: TP2 MOD_IS_INSTALLED checks, lib/always.tph scs_ai/scs_smrt_mgs vars, Morpheus compatibility statement on TR website, G3 forums April 2026

conflicts.reason: Both increase creature HP. MiH cn:6 adds bonus HP per HD by creature type (configurable). TR cn:25-30 apply blanket multipliers. Stacking makes enemies extremely tanky.
Tactics Remix auto-skips all components when Made in Heaven mods are detected. Incompatible — choose one.
Reported incompatible by LCC-docs database (lcc id 1022 vs 665)

a: Wes Weimer, Gebhard Blucher, Kensai Ryu, Xyx, Ishan, morpheus562
sum: Tactics Remix pre-tactical section: initial setup and creature improvements that enhance enemy intelligence.

ki.description: Tactics Remix is a comprehensive difficulty overhaul (v3.0+) that overlaps substantially with SCS's AI and encounter systems. Most TR components are effective replacements for SCS equivalents. TR author says TR detects SCS and adapts, but user feedback suggests picking one or the other for the AI/encounter layer gives a cleaner experience. Safe SCS-with-TR components: general-game tweaks (non-AI, non-encounter) like item/spell additions (IWD Arcane/Divine Spells cn:1500/1510).
ki.workaround: If using SCS alongside TR: pick SCS for AI/encounter framework OR pick TR for comprehensive difficulty overhaul; not both for the same content. TR's Add New Encounters group installs BEFORE SCS; Update Existing Encounters + Enemy Improvements groups install AFTER SCS — this is already encoded via per-component category placement.

advisories.reason: TR creature scripts assume vanilla/SCS spell behavior and do not adapt to SR. Enemies may use ineffective spell combos. HP multiplier components (#25-30) unaffected. Not a crash — just suboptimal enemy AI. Install SR before TR.
advisories.myComps: #8 Kuroisan #10 The Ritual #11 Red Badge #37 Lich in Docks #38 Gnome F/I #8 Improved Sahuagin #65 Improved Irenicus #37 Improved Guarded Compound #12 Improved Twisted Rune #14 Improved Demon Knights #15 Tougher Kangaxx #6 Improved Crypt King #17 Improved Copper Coronet #19 Improved Small Teeth #35 Improved Planar Prison #29 #39 Improved Drizzt #7018 Tougher Fire Giants #7020 Tougher Githyanki #7022 Tougher Yuan-ti
advisories.source: TR SPELL_REV variable unused; suboptimal not broken, 2026-04
